TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kinayiman, title = Kinayiman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kinayiman} }

S.FORM: alang Kinayiman ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Haruhi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 243 buwan, 781 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 696 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 85 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 88%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kinayiman hya' ga Lalekeleke. tay 'zil na Kinayiman hya' ga Tjuvecekadan. skaki' maku' b'bu' na rgyax mita' ga, si kaki' roziq qu qalang na Kinayiman. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu

alang Kinayiman ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Haruhi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 243 buwan, 781 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 696 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 85 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 88%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kinayiman hya' ga Lalekeleke. tay 'zil na Kinayiman hya' ga Tjuvecekadan. skaki' maku' b'bu' na rgyax mita' ga, si kaki' roziq qu qalang na Kinayiman. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu
S.PHON: alaŋ kinajiman ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu ħaruħi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kinajiman ħjaʔ ɣa lalekeleke. taj ʔzil na kinajiman ħjaʔ ɣa tju*eʦ~ʨeka*an. s~ɕkakiʔ makuʔ βʔβuʔ na rɣjax mitaʔ ɣa, s~ɕi kakiʔ roziq qu qalaŋ na kinajiman. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu
